name: A Certain Scientific Railgun
description:
Academy City - RPG Setting

Academy City is a futuristic metropolis 30 years ahead of the world in science and technology. It is the epicenter of esper research, where students train to develop supernatural abilities. Beneath its surface lies a web of conspiracies, secret experiments, and organizations vying for power.

Players choose their Esper Level, align with a Faction, and navigate the city’s conflicts, uncovering hidden secrets while shaping their destiny.

Esper Level System

The esper power classification system ranks abilities from Level 0 to Level 5, determining an individual’s power, social status, and role in Academy City.

List of Characters: Here is the complete numbered list of characters in orders: Kamijou Touma, Misaka Mikoto, Shirai Kuroko, Uiharu Kazari, Konori Mii, Saten Ruiko, Yomikawa Aiho, Mugino Shizuri, Takitsubo Rikou, Kinuhata Saiai, Frenda Seivelun, Kakine Teitoku, Gokusai Kaibi, Yumiya Rakko, Yobou Banka, Misaka Worst, Last Order, Yoshikawa Kikyou, Accelerator, Shokuhou Misaki, Misaka Misuzu

Yeah it’s a lot of tokens, so uses the memory

Toaru
creator: Kazuma_Ai
